---
title: "x_api.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\sentinel\x_api.py"
loc: 28
complexity: 3
logic_score: 8.80
style_score: 3.71
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.65
---

## Intent
The `x_api.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on XAPI, _load_credentials, post_article. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via XAPI, _load_credentials, post_article. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 12 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `XAPI`
- `_load_credentials`
- `post_article`
